subject: A massive segmented worm or leech creature coiled in an urban alley, with a bird caught in its upper appendage and an iron chain around its body
description: A towering, bloated worm or leech creature dominates the frame. Its body is heavily segmented and covered in dense wart-like protrusions, giving it a diseased, encrusted texture. The creature rears upward with a long tendril or secondary appendage at its tip, which has snagged a bird — possibly a pigeon — mid-flight. An iron chain wraps around the creature's mid-body and leads off-frame, suggesting it has broken free of restraints or is partially bound. The background reveals an urban environment: stone walls, iron fencing, and Gothic-style architectural spires rising in grey fog. The palette is muted grey-green and stone, with the bird providing the only warm element.
foreground: massive segmented worm-leech creature with warted body, iron chain around mid-section
background: urban stone walls, iron fence, gothic spires in fog
